_phase4_gate_summary.notes: Sprint 11's perform_upsert() adds a THIRD flag-guarded hook block immediately after Sprint 9's entity hook. The temporal hook is code-present but flag-OFF (ASSOC_TEMPORAL_WRITE_ENABLED=False). Observed p95 (0.836 ms) is 14.8% BELOW the Sprint 5 baseline (0.981 ms), 1.3% below the Sprint 6 flag-off baseline (0.848 ms), and 6.9% below the Sprint 9 flag-off baseline (0.898 ms). All three comparisons are comfortably inside the <=10% regression gate vs. the canonical Sprint 5 reference — in fact, the p95 is monotonically decreasing across Sprint 5 -> 6 -> 11 in our measurements (Sprint 9 is the one small bump and still well inside the gate). Sub-millisecond measurements carry material run-to-run variance (stdev ~0.063 ms here across 30 samples), so the interpretation is 'noise-bounded, no regression observed' rather than 'real speedup'. Structurally, the flag-off hook path is a single ``if`` condition and a branch-not-taken: no imports, no allocations, no object construction. All three hooks (Sprint 6 similarity, Sprint 9 entity, Sprint 11 temporal) are side-by-side and flag-off identically free.
_phase4_gate_summary.measurement_methodology: Same harness (measure_perform_upsert_latency.py) and same fixture (fx-01-decision-novatrade) as Sprint 5, 6, and 9, so the comparison is apples-to-apples. 30 iterations with 3 warmup.
_phase4_gate_summary.hook_code_path_when_flag_off: Single attribute read (settings.ASSOC_TEMPORAL_WRITE_ENABLED), single boolean AND against ``success``, branch-not-taken. No other work. All three Sprint 6 / 9 / 11 hook blocks are equally flag-off-free.
_phase4_gate_summary.hook_code_path_when_flag_on_first_call: Lazy import + construct TemporalLinker + MemoryEdgeService once (the former takes ``driver=self.graph_client.driver`` so the built-in predecessor-lookup is used), then enqueue_link() which validates session_id/event_seq are both present and schedules a background task via asyncio.create_task. Subsequent calls skip the lazy path.
_phase4_gate_summary.next_action: Phase 4 Sprint 11 code changes are latency-safe. Promote to review + mark Phase 4 CLOSED pending operator checkpoint.

phase2_gate: Phase 2 p95 overhead must not regress by more than 10% over this baseline
notes: perform_upsert() under ASSOC_* all-False with every backend mocked; isolates orchestration cost.
